title: atalantia roxburghiana
intro: Atalantia roxburghiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the "yellow mangosteen" due to its resemblance to the mangosteen fruit. The plant is used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia, particularly in India and Sri Lanka, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Atalantia roxburghiana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Atalantia roxburghiana is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and dried fruit extracts, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
